entry.title: Tour framing tightened around one record loop
entry.summary: The tour now frames Plectis as a system-like layer over existing source and result records, and points first-time readers to one focused command-card-evidence loop before the whole map.

entry.title: Microcosm became Plectis
entry.summary: Plectis became the preferred public name, with Microcosm retained only as a historical and compatibility label. The acknowledgement is source-backed and does not imply endorsement or affiliation.
